creator: kevlo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Afanasiev from comment #2)
This is your personal requirement.  You could replace pidgin with finch
in both BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS or send a patchset to fix all plugins 
ports for pidgin, such as pidgin-birthday-reminder, pidgin-skypeweb, 
pidgin-twitter ...etc.
